title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.377 - K.C. Wolf day designated for November 23
text:
9.377.  K.C. Wolf day designated for November 23. — November twenty-third each year is hereby designated as "K.C. Wolf Day" in Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to participate in appropriate events and activities to celebrate the mascot of the Kansas City Chiefs football team.
(L. 2023 S.B. 139)
